_meta.note_delta_a: Delta A (LoRA-trained judge vs baseline) requires GPU training. Run scripts/train_judge_lora.py in Google Colab T4, then scripts/run_ablation.py. The training script and preference pairs (eval/tenacious_bench/training_data/pairs_v2.jsonl) are complete and ready.

key_findings.prompt_judge_pass_rate: 100% — qwen3-8b zero-shot predicted PASS for every single held-out task. Severe positive bias; uncalibrated zero-shot LLM judge is unusable without preference training. This validates Path B: the base model CANNOT distinguish aligned from misaligned outreach without weight updates.
key_findings.rule_evaluator_vs_prompt: Rule evaluator (48%) >> Prompt judge (22%) on held-out. Rule evaluator correctly catches 15/50 failures; prompt judge catches 0.
key_findings.ground_truth_quality: 25/50 held-out tasks are llm_synthesis mode. These tasks have empty fail_cats=[] and GT=FAIL, suggesting a systematic labeling artifact in the synthetic generator. Rule evaluator accuracy on llm_synthesis tasks is 36% vs 58-62% on programmatic/hand_authored tasks. This is a known limitation documented in methodology_rationale.md.
rule_evaluator_gaps: Injection edge cases (XSS in company name, prompt injection in notes field): not in rule layer
Signal overclaiming (asserting 1 job post = aggressive hiring): requires numeric reasoning
Bench external language ('bench' not in banned phrases list): v0.1 gap
Tone drift / deadline pressure patterns: partial regex coverage only
Wrong-segment pitch in subtle cases: keyword heuristics miss nuanced framing
key_findings.case_for_lora_training: The 100% PASS bias of the zero-shot judge, combined with the rule evaluator's injection/overclaiming gaps, provides the strongest possible justification for DPO training. The 279 preference pairs specifically target these failure modes. Expected Delta A post-training: +15-25pp over prompt judge on the targeted failure categories.

Training script: scripts/train_judge_lora.py (requires Colab T4 GPU, ~45 min). Ablation script: scripts/run_ablation.py.

delta_a_trained_judge.description: DPO implicit reward β*(log π_DPO − log π_ref). Sign→verdict. No generation.

delta_a_generation_baseline.note: Invalid — training pairs used email bodies not verdicts; PASS bias throughout
